description_long: This object consists of two rectangular suitcases placed side by side, one with a dark brown exterior and the other with a deep green exterior. Both suitcases have a smooth, slightly glossy finish and appear to be made of a hard, possibly leather-like or synthetic material. Each suitcase features a prominent handle on the front, with the brown suitcase having a metallic silver latch and the green suitcase a reddish latch, both centrally located above the handle. The edges are rounded, and the surfaces are free of any visible logos, external pockets, or decorative elements. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and portability, suitable for travel or personal storage. The suitcases are compact and likely intended for hand-carrying rather than rolling.
description: A pair of compact, hard-shell suitcases—one brown and one green—each with a central handle and latch, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both suitcases side by side, with visible handles and metallic latches.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and thickness of the suitcases, with handles and latches partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned backs of both suitcases with no handles or latches visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness and the plain sides of the suitcases, with no handles or latches visible.
